strengths: 18+ years of fullstack experience, well beyond the 6+ required, with recent TypeScript/Node.js/React product work at Optilyz and re:cinq
Direct AI agent development experience — builds MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks at current role, matching an explicit JD requirement
Deep testing and craftsmanship culture: TDD/pairing/trunk-based at RIDE, authored test libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and taught testing courses
concerns: No Nest.js experience mentioned anywhere on the résumé, despite it being a primary stack item
Kotlin is absent and Java exposure is limited to older robotics work at Altom (2016-2018); Python not listed
No explicit Vitest/Jest/Playwright evidence, and much frontend history is Ember.js rather than React
response.justification: The candidate exceeds the experience bar with strong recent evidence on the primary stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS CDK at Optilyz, plus Kubernetes/Docker deployment for GISCollective. The required AI agent development skill is concretely evidenced by MCP code-generator and agentic-framework work at re:cinq. Cloud, containers, Git, and databases are all demonstrated, and testing expertise is exceptional in culture (TDD, authored test frameworks, Selenium course) even though Vitest/Jest are not named. Gaps are secondary-stack items: no Nest.js citation, dated Java, no Kotlin or Python. Given strong primary-stack and AI-agent evidence with learnable framework gaps, this is a strong fit.
